## Meeting Purpose

[Review account progress, discuss new clients, and address team updates and challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vappy, StackBlitz, and Webflow are high-priority clients requiring immediate attention and resources](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Several new clients onboarded, including Sunbit, Shape, and potentially Doctor](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Team facing challenges with client expectations, design resources, and workflow optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Multiple team members (Edo, Jacks, Vivek, Ariana) being considered for promotion to senior roles](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Topics

### Vappy Client Update

  - [CEO Jordan highly excited about partnership, but expectations are high](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Focus on programmatically creating voice agents using JSON config files](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Need for design resources and MVP page development with embedded voice agent](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim to create user-generated template experience similar to Notion](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### StackBlitz and Webflow Strategies

  - [StackBlitz needs CMS recommendation; considering Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Webflow client churning, but potential for upsell with new PSEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Both clients require design support and engineering involvement](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### New Client Onboarding

  - [Sunbit kickoff successful, despite lengthy legal and banking review process](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Shape Week started, with aggressive growth expectations (3x traffic in 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [Tiro considering churn but may be open to renegotiation](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Doctor (potential new client) interested due to team's SEMrush experience](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=3798.0)

### Team Performance and Processes

  - [Edo praised for preparedness and proactive communication](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)

  - [Need for better documentation of successful client work and cool workflows](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Fact-checker workflow highlighted as impressive tool for article analysis](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=3054.0)

  - [Need for clearer kickoff meeting recaps and next steps documentation](https://fathom.video/share/x1xww635E3zN7XcD2yYegqT6i6DkrJTX?tab=summary&timestamp=3575.0)
